message:
security: increase PBKDF2 iterations, add HTML escaping, limit chunk sizes

Critical security improvements based on deep code review:

1. PBKDF2 iterations: 100,000 → 600,000 (OWASP 2023 minimum)
   - Passwords are now 6x harder to brute-force

2. Html type: Add Html::escaped() for XSS prevention
   - Html::new() remains for trusted content with safety warning
   - escape_html() function escapes & < > " '

3. Chunked encoding: Add 16MB per-chunk limit
   - Prevents DoS via absurdly large chunk size headers
   - Applied to both sync and async chunked parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
